title: UIAO OrgTree Policy Targeting Canon
description: Machine-readable declarations of how Intune device policies, Azure Policy assignments, and NAC policy bindings target the OrgTree. Bound to UIAO_164 by ADR-039 (Intune + Azure Policy) and extended by ADR-073 (NAC third transport). Depends on UIAO_151 codebook (ADR-035), UIAO_152 dynamic groups (ADR-036), UIAO_153 device planes (ADR-038). Policy bodies are out of scope.

nac_assignments.description: NAC policy bindings introduced by ADR-073 as the third targeting transport (alongside Intune + Azure Policy). Each entry binds an AAA-server policy to an OrgTree-* device dynamic group with a network-edge enforcement payload (VLAN / dACL / SGT / posture-profile). The AAA server (Cisco ISE / Aruba ClearPass / Entra RADIUS Proxy / NPS during the hybrid window) returns this payload on RADIUS Access-Accept. Per ADR-073 §D6 Phase B, schema validates well-formedness; cross-canon checks against IPAM (VLAN existence) and AAA-server inventories (dACL / posture profile existence) are Phase C.

assignment_name.description: Human-readable binding name. Unique within this file. NOT the tenant-assigned Azure Policy assignment id.

nacAssignment.description: Binds an AAA-server policy to an OrgTree-* device dynamic group with a network-edge enforcement payload. See ADR-073 §D1.

assignment_name.description: Human-readable binding name. Unique across the file (shares the namespace with arc_policy_assignments[]).

aaa_server.description: Which AAA-tier registered adapter (per ADR-047) services this policy.

policy_kind.description: AAA-vendor policy kind. policy-set is ISE; service is ClearPass; connection-policy is Entra RADIUS / NPS; posture-profile is cross-vendor.

target_group.description: OrgTree-* device dynamic group (UIAO_152). Cross-canon resolution against dynamic-groups.yaml is loader-enforced.

enforcement.description: Network-edge enforcement payload returned on RADIUS Access-Accept. Phase B validates well-formedness; cross-canon checks against IPAM (vlan_id existence) and AAA-server inventory (dacl_name / posture_profile existence) are Phase C.

change_of_authorization.description: If true, the AAA server issues CoA on Intune-compliance-state transitions to force re-evaluation.

intent.description: permit returns the enforcement payload; quarantine forces a quarantine VLAN regardless of other matches (used for ORG-BRANCH-UNPOSITIONED); deny issues RADIUS Access-Reject. Per ADR-073, every new deny intent requires governance review.
